// Import the pillarbox library import pillarbox from '@srgssr/pillarbox-web'; const player = pillarbox( 'video-element-id', { fill: true, muted: true, // Add the playback rate component to the player playbackRates: [0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.25, 1.5, 2], } ); player.src({ src: 'urn:rts:video:9883196', type: 'srgssr/urn' }); window.player = player;
